title: Sum Root to Leaf Numbers
input_format: The `root` of a binary tree containing digits from `0` to `9`.
output_format: The total sum of all root-to-leaf numbers.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the tree is in the range `[1, 1000]`.
- `0 <= Node.val <= 9`
- The depth of the tree will not exceed `10`.
